stemHtml: A SIGMET announces Severe Mountain Waves in the region of your aircraft, stating FL70/200 WKN. What does this mean?

options.a: There are mountain waves at FL70 with at least 200 ft/min downdrafts.
options.b: There are mountain waves at FL70 with at least 600 ft/min downdrafts.
options.c: There are mountain waves at FL70 with at least 200 kt wind from the West.
options.d: There are mountain waves at FL70 with at least 200 kt wind from the East.
